figures.caption: Table 1: Comparison across benchmarks RefCoCo Yu et al. (2016), HERM-Bench Li et al. (2024a), HC-RefLoCo Wei et al. (2024), HumanRef Jiang et al. (2025b), Face-Human Qin et al. (2025) and MHPR (Ours). V-Grouding: Visual Grouding; R-Grounding: Reference Grouding; V-Perception: Visual perception; V-Reasoning: Visual Reasoning.
Figure 1: Overall pipeline for CAAP, including three steps: GetDiff, Vote and Mix.
Figure 2: Overall pipeline for VAGP, including three steps: VQA Generation, Vote and Manual Review.
Table 2: Our evaluation dimensions primarily include Single Person, Multiple Persons, and Person–Object Interaction, covering multiple levels from perception to reasoning.
Figure 3: examples of bad cases, respectively covering spatial understanding, reasoning, and finegrained perception.
